title: Permutations II
problem_statement: Given a collection of numbers that may contain duplicates, return all unique permutations.

examples.explanation: All permutations when elements are distinct.

intuition: Sort the numbers and backtrack while skipping duplicates at the same position.

approaches.name: Backtracking with Visited Set
approaches.description: Use a boolean visited array and skip duplicate values when they would appear in the same position twice.

interview_qa.a: This ensures duplicate numbers do not generate the same permutation in a different order.
Sorting groups duplicates together so the skip condition can identify equivalent placements.
